LM75B_simple.ino.functionality: reads temperature data from the LM75B sensor and prints the value to the serial port

P3T1035_simple.ino.functionality: sample code demonstrating the operation of the P3T1035 temperature sensor; reads temperature data and prints the value to the serial port

P3T1085_interrupt.ino.functionality: sets up and reads from the P3T1085 temperature sensor, handling interrupts and printing temperature values to the serial port

P3T1085_simple.ino.functionality: reads temperature data from the P3T1085 sensor and prints the value to the serial port

P3T1085_simple_on_Arduino_Due.ino.functionality: reads temperature data from P3T1085 sensor and prints the value to the serial port

P3T1755_interrupt.ino.functionality: shows P3T1755 temperature sensor operation with interrupt and timer readout

P3T1755_simple.ino.functionality: reads temperature from the P3T1755 sensor and prints the value to the serial port

P3T2030_simple.ino.functionality: reads temperature data from P3T2030 sensor and prints the value to the serial port

PCT2075DP-ARD_interrupt_by_Tos_Thyst.ino.functionality: operates PCT2075 temperature sensor with interrupt to manage heater control

PCT2075_simple.ino.functionality: reads temperature data from PCT2075 sensor and prints the value to the serial port
